positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a lone mountain range at sunrise, viewed through a perfect circular window. The mountains are silhouetted in deep indigo and charcoal black. The sky is a gradient wash of soft peach, pale gold, and vibrant coral pink. Include small, stylized crescent moons and geometric constellation lines visible in the upper sky. The foreground features clean, stylized pine tree silhouettes arranged symmetrically. Vector illustration style, high contrast, graphic novel aesthetic, extreme negative space, suitable for screen printing on natural fiber fabric, centered composition, atmospheric lighting, volumetric, clean lines, art deco influence.
